topic: Approval gate threshold updated to $1.00 cost

approval_gate_rule.trigger: Before executing any task where estimated cost exceeds $1.00
approval_gate_rule.notification: ⚠️ Next action estimated at [X] tokens ([X] cache write / [X] cache read / [X] output). Estimated cost: $[X]. This exceeds the $1.00 threshold. Reply APPROVE to proceed or CANCEL to abort.
approval_gate_rule.behaviour: Agent waits for explicit APPROVE reply before continuing. CANCEL aborts the task.
